_readme: Michael's manual data inputs for the H2H model. Optional. Only fill what you have; the model treats anything missing as 'no data' and never fabricates. Player keys are the numeric api-tennis ids (same as p1Key/p2Key in matches.json, e.g. Kopriva = 1083).

_example_1083.note: Delete the leading underscore in the key to activate. Adjustment 8 uses winners/unforced as a ratio (>1 = aggressive & clean).
